textByHash.24b936ce125ad3159d43aa2bc13db2b72ac8aa07: Nope, plenty of small fish though.
textByHash.1d876ecff95f29bf3d47db2782c96778f48a366e: Blimey! Where did you come from? Not another one of those treasure hunters are you?
textByHash.217d898db32fa83986e081203e88409fd0537206: They say there's treasure hidden within the waterfall, left behind by the old elven king. Not that anyone's ever found anything.
textByHash.4142fd99e720eb4b4650d39da0eaa351ba2fb57c: You could ask Hadley the tourist guide. He'll be in this building just here.
textByHash.07d8a01bb3afbeb4df64537d7783ee1ead4cecdb: Hello traveller. Are you here to fish or to hunt for treasure?
textByHash.c40c88f2ebd7e03de352857aa1fd03768a449fc7: Adventurers pass through here every week, they never find anything though.
textByHash.b08bd278d552f45d83c6fac7d8075115cf624db2: Good day to you traveller, are you here to fish or just looking around? I've caught some beauties down here.
textByHash.6963032d64a78c5ff3b5f286357c0bfbdbeb7b87: The last one was this big!
